                                                        INTERNET & SAAS (ZIA) : ABOUT URL CATEGORIES




Internet & SaaS (ZIA)
About URL Categories
 Watch a video about URL Categories (shows legacy UI).

Zscaler organizes URLs into a hierarchy of categories for granular filtering and policy creation. There
are 6 predefined classes, which are then each divided into predefined super categories, and then
further divided into predefined categories.
For example, the Bandwidth Loss class includes categories such as video and music streaming because
they are typically known to consume more bandwidth than other categories. These classes are also
customizable, so if you think that video streaming should not be classified under Bandwidth Loss, you
can manually move it to another classification that works best for you and your organization.
The 6 predefined classes are:
    Bandwidth Loss

                                 Super Category: Entertainment/Recreation
      Categories and Definitions                         Examples
      Entertainment: Sites that provide information
      on or promote mass entertainment media such        www.mangahere.co,
      as theater, amusement parks, music, comics,        www.anime-planet.com
      fan clubs, and so on.
      Music and Audio Streaming: Sites that
      promote music for entertainment purposes           www.itunes.com,
      related to bands, orchestras, festivals, and so    www.spotify.com
      on. It also includes audio streaming websites.
      Other Entertainment/Recreation: Other sites
                                                         rockcreekrvpark.com,
      related to entertainment/recreation that are
                                                         destinywateradventures.com
      not included in the defined categories.
      Radio Stations: Sites that offer streaming or      radioducinema.com,
      downloadable radio programming.                    statsradio.com
      Video Streaming: Sites that are related to         netflix.com,
      streaming video.                                   hotstar.com



                                                                             ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   1
                                                    INTERNET & SAAS (ZIA) : ABOUT URL CATEGORIES




                             Super Category: Entertainment/Recreation
  Categories and Definitions                        Examples
  Television/Movies: Sites related to television    imdb.com,
  programming or movies.                            movies.com

                                  Super Category: News and Media
  Categories and Definitions                        Examples
  News and Media: Sites that report information
  or commentary on current events or
                                                    www.cnn.com,
  contemporary issues, including newspapers,
                                                    www.asiaone.com
  newswire services, news magazines, and
  radio news stations.

                                   Super Category: User-Defined
  Categories and Definitions
  You can populate this category with sub-categories or URLs that you manually create.


 Business Use

                               Super Category: Business and Economy
  Categories and Definitions                        Examples
  Classifieds: Sites that display advertisements
  for sale or purchase of goods and services. It    www.craigslist.com,
  also includes sites like the marriage bureau,     www.gumtree.com
  etc.
  Corporate Marketing: Sites that offer
                                                    www.adobe.com,
  corporate and product information but do not
                                                    www.apple.com
  sell products.
  Finance: Sites that provide information related   www.hsbc.com,
  to financial investment and firms that offer      www.citibank.com


                                                                       ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   2
                                                    INTERNET & SAAS (ZIA) : ABOUT URL CATEGORIES




                             Super Category: Business and Economy
Categories and Definitions                          Examples
financial services. It doesn't include websites
that are related to insurance.
Insurance: Sites that allow users to compare
and buy insurance policies and resources
explaining specific types of insurance (e.g.,
                                                    www.tataaig.com,
life insurance, health insurance). This
                                                    www.unitedhealthgroup.com
category includes company websites that
provide self-service options for managing
policies.
Online Trading and Brokerage: Sites that
provide trading of securities and management
                                                    ameritrade.com,
of investment assets. This category includes
                                                    etrade.com
sites that offer financial investment strategies,
quotes, and news.
Other Business and Economy: Other sites
                                                    etrind.com.br,
related to business and economy that are not
                                                    dfsafrica.org
classified in any of the defined categories.
Professional Services: Sites that provide
information about or are related to the sale        www.work.co,
and delivery of technical and professional          www.issworld.com
services.

                                    Super Category: Education
Categories and Definitions                          Examples
Continuing Education/Colleges: Sites related
                                                    www.duke.edu,
to institutions and colleges offering formal
                                                    www.ox.ac.uk
courses of advanced studies for adults.
History: Sites that offer a systematic recording    www.hyperhistory.com,
of past events or analysis and commentary on        www.besthistorysites.net



                                                                       ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   3
                                                    INTERNET & SAAS (ZIA) : ABOUT URL CATEGORIES




                                    Super Category: Education
Categories and Definitions                          Examples
causes and effects, motives, or connections
relating to events.
                                                    www.k12.com,
K-12: Sites related to the education of children.
                                                    www.ilacademy.net
Other Education: Other sites related to
                                                    students-tut.ru,
education that is not included in the defined
                                                    formasup-npc.org
categories.
Reference Sites: Sites that offer scholars and
                                                    www.wikipedia.org,
academics source documents and research
                                                    www.dictionary.com
assistance.
Science/Tech: Sites related to science and          www.scitechdaily.com,
technology.                                         www.livescience.com

                             Super Category: Information Technology
Categories and Definitions                          Examples
Advertising: Sites that provide service links,      www.buysellads.com,
banners, or ads for websites.                       www.fusionads.net
Generative AI and ML Applications: Sites that
provide tools, services, or information related
                                                    openai.com,
to generative AI (i.e., a subfield of artificial
                                                    bard.google.com
intelligence that can generate new text,
images, videos, or audio.).
CDN: Sites that use content delivery networks
                                                    cdn.espn.com,
to optimize the delivery of localized content to
                                                    bighost.be
end users.
Developer Tools: Sites that provide tools used      rubyonrails.org,
by developers for coding, debugging, testing
                                                    github.com
and managing software projects. This
category includes websites and online


                                                                        ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   4
                                                     INTERNET & SAAS (ZIA) : ABOUT URL CATEGORIES




                             Super Category: Information Technology
Categories and Definitions                           Examples
platforms related to software development,
programming, and IT infrastructure.
DNS Over HTTPS Services: Sites that provide
DNS resolution over an encrypted and secure
connection with the DNS over HTTPS service.          dns.google/dns-query,
This category includes DNS server URLs that          cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query
support DNS resolution using the HTTPS
protocol.
File Convertors: Sites and services that allow
                                                     www.freepdfconvert.com,
users to convert files from one format to
                                                     www.freeconvert.com
another.
FileHost: Sites that offer hosting, backup, and
sharing of files on the internet. It also includes   www.dropbox.com,
sites that allow you to upload files for online      www.pdftoimage.com
processing, such as file conversion.
General AI and ML Applications: Sites that
offer non-generative AI and ML applications
and services. This category includes websites
                                                     aimagazine.com,
for AI research labs, AI-powered solution
                                                     www.aitrends.com
providers, AI/ML app demonstrations and
tutorials, and that enable automation with AI
and ML.
Image Host: Sites that provide video or image        www.flickr.com,
hosting, linking, or sharing.                        www.imgur.com
Operating System and Software Updates:
Sites and links that are used for downloading        swcdn.apple.com,
operating systems such as Windows, iOS, etc.         windowsupdate.microsoft.com
and software updates.

                             Super Category: Information Technology
Categories and Definitions                          Examples
Other Information Technology: Other sites
                                                    kwonnam.pe.kr,
related to information technology that are not
                                                    bellsouthemailsettings.com
included in the defined categories.
Portals: Sites that offer multiple web-based
                                                    qq.com,
services to assist a user's experience on the
                                                    naver.com
internet.
Safe Search Engine: Sites that provide internet
search services geared specifically for             www.safesearchkids.com,
families and children and prevent the               fragfinn.de
discovery of objectionable material.
Shareware Download: Sites that are related to
                                                    www.download.cnet.com,
or offer downloading of a large number of
                                                    www.filehippo.com
legal third party software.
Translators: Sites that offer translation
                                                    translate.google.com,
services for web pages, URLs, or other text
                                                    www.freetranslation.com
strings.
Web Host: Sites that offer web hosting
                                                    www.siteground.com,
services, as well as domain names and web
                                                    www.myown.eu
space, to host end user web pages.
Web Search: Sites that offer search services        www.google.com,
for the internet, indices, and directories.         www.yahoo.com

                             Super Category: Internet Communication
Categories and Definitions                          Examples
Blogs: Sites related to online journals, diaries,
                                                    www.tumblr.com,
or newsletters that express personal thoughts
                                                    www.wordpress.org
and opinions about social or political issues.
Discussion Forums: Sites related to Usenet,         www.cellar.org,
Usenet news, forums, newsgroups, or online          www.wsc-forum.de

                             Super Category: Internet Communication
Categories and Definitions                           Examples
bulletin board systems.
Internet Services: Sites that offer online utility
                                                     www.singnet.com.sg,
applications or services that assist in internet
                                                     www.imagin.com
communication.
Online Chat: Sites that offer access to,
software for, or participation in any internet       finnchat.com,
chat forum. Chat is defined as any online            msngr.com
conversation taking place in real time.
Other Internet Communication: Other sites
                                                     softyupdates.com,
related to internet communications that are
                                                     ipixo.com
not included in the defined categories.
Peer-to-Peer Site: Sites that provide client
software to enable peer-to-peer file sharing         www.bittorrent.com, www.limewire.com
and transfers.
Remote Access Tools: Sites that provide
information or software to enable authorized         www.teamviewer.com,
access to a desktop computer or private              www.logmein.com
network from a remote location.
Webmail: Sites that provide email accounts,          www.mail.google.com,
free or otherwise.                                   www.hotmail.com
Web Conferencing: Sites that assist in
                                                     www.webex.com,
conducting video conferencing or provide
                                                     www.zoom.us
software to enable virtual meetings.
Zscaler Proxy IPs: This category includes IP
addresses owned by Zscaler's data centers
and services such as IP addresses of the
Public Service Edge on a cloud and global VIP
service.




                                                                         ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   7
                                                 INTERNET & SAAS (ZIA) : ABOUT URL CATEGORIES




                          Super Category: Job/Employment Search
Categories and Definitions                       Examples
Job/Employment Search: Sites that provide
                                                 www.monster.com,
employment services, assistance in finding
                                                 www.indeed.com
employment, or tools for locating employers.

    Super Category: Microsoft Office 365 (Applicable only for SSL/TLS Inspection Policy)
Categories and Definitions                       Examples
MS O365 Allow: Sites that are required but are
not as sensitive to network performance and
latency as those in the Optimize category.
                                                 smtp.office365.com
   Microsoft recommends bypassing
  these sites from SSL/TLS Inspection
   and authentication.

MS O365 Default: Sites that do not require any
                                                 ssw.live.com,
optimization and can be treated as regular
                                                 storage.live.com
internet traffic.
MS O365 Optimize: Sites that are required for
connectivity to every Office 365 service.
These sites are very sensitive to network
performance, latency, and availability.
                                                 outlook.office.com,
                                                 outlook.office365.com
   Ensure to bypass these sites from
  SSL/TLS Inspection and
   authentication.




                                                                    ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   8
                                                     INTERNET & SAAS (ZIA) : ABOUT URL CATEGORIES




 General Surfing

                               Super Category: Government and Politics
  Categories and Definitions                         Examples

   Government: Sites related to governments and www.usa.gov,
   their agencies or militaries.                www.gov.sg
   Military: Sites related to military or armed
                                                     www.af.mil,
   forces, excluding those that discuss or sell
                                                     www.army.mil
   weapons.
   Other Government and Politics: Other sites
                                                     wec24.org,
   related to government and politics that are not
                                                     covid-sb.org
   included in the defined categories.
   Politics: Sites related to, or sponsored by,
   organizations that seek to influence              www.nrsc.org,
   viewpoints, change or reform public policy,       www.pap.org.sg
   public opinion, or government practices.

                                    Super Category: Miscellaneous
  Categories and Definitions
   Miscellaneous or Unknown: Sites that have not yet been classified by Zscaler.
   Newly Registered and Observed Domains: Sites whose domains were created in the last 30
   days and are currently not categorized by Zscaler. This category also includes domains that we
   encounter for the first time. Domains under this category are considered suspicious until they
   are categorized or better understood by Zscaler.
   This category is a subset of the Miscellaneous category. To determine if a Miscellaneous or
   Unknown URL belongs in the Newly Registered and Observed Domain (NROD) category, when a
   URL is found in the Miscellaneous or Unknown category, it is checked against Zscaler's NROD
   database. If there’s a match, the URL is categorized as a Newly Registered and Observed
   Domain. To enable the use of this category, select Enable Suspicious New Domains Lookup in
   your Advanced URL Policy Settings.
   This category can only be used in URL Filtering rules.



                                                                       ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   9
                                                       INTERNET & SAAS (ZIA) : ABOUT URL CATEGORIES




                                    Super Category: Miscellaneous
   Categories and Definitions
   Non Categorizable: Sites that Zscaler has not been able to categorize. Some of the reasons a
   site might appear here are that the site is a login page without any other details, it no longer
   exists, it is parked or available for sale, or it is unresolvable on the internet.
   Other Miscellaneous: Other sites that are not included in the defined categories.

                                         Super Category: Travel
   Categories and Definitions                          Examples
   Travel: Sites related to travel planning,
   information, or activities, including reservation   www.contiki.com,
   services, destination listings, and special         www.singaporeair.com
   event promotion.

                                        Super Category: Vehicles
   Categories and Definitions                          Examples
   Vehicles: Sites that provide information about
                                                       www.toyota.com,
   or promote vehicles, or offer for purchase
                                                       www.volkswagen.com
   vehicle parts or maintenance.


 Legal Liability

                                     Super Category: Adult Material
   Categories and Definitions                          Examples
   Adult Sex Education: Sites related to sex           www.plannedparenthood.com,
   education and targeted at adult readers.            www.itsyoursexlife.com
   Adult Themes: Sites related to adult content
   not covered by more specific categories, for        www.yourtango.com/sex,
   example, penile enlargement, erectile               www.singlebrides.com
   dysfunction, adult entertainment, and so on.


                                                                          ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   10
                                                  INTERNET & SAAS (ZIA) : ABOUT URL CATEGORIES




                                  Super Category: Adult Material
Categories and Definitions                        Examples
Body Art: Sites that provide information about
artistic sexual expression or information about   kicktattoo.com,
or images of body piercing, tattoos, and any      tattoogrid.net
form of body art.
K-12 Sex Education: Sites associated with sex
education for children, including sites that
                                                  www.teensource.org,
offer information about sex, human
                                                  www.sexetc.org
reproduction, or any other sexually oriented
material used to educate.
Lingerie/Bikini: Sites that display or are
dedicated to lingerie or swimsuits that could     www.wacoal.com,
be considered inappropriate for teenagers and     www.agentprovocateur.com
younger children.
Nudity: Sites that provide either artistic or
non-artistic nude images in any medium            nakedsipandpaint.com,
(sculpture, photographs, paintings, and so        prostitutkimoskvyxxx.com
on).
Other Adult Material: Other sites related to
                                                  teamcrazy.za.net,
adult material that are not in the defined
                                                  smilemakerscollection.com
categories.
Pornography: Sites related to soft- and hard-
                                                  www.playboy.com,
core pornography, regardless of medium
                                                  www.sex.com
(written, images, movies, and so on).
Social Networking Adult: Sites that provide
                                                  www.okcupid.com,
social networking for adults, such as dating
                                                  www.ashleymadison.com
sites.




                                                                     ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   11
                                                    INTERNET & SAAS (ZIA) : ABOUT URL CATEGORIES




                                      Super Category: Drugs
Categories and Definitions                          Examples
Other Drugs: Sites associated with the use or
advocacy of illegal drugs or the illegal use of     livwell.com,
prescribed drugs, except those sites related to     buyecstasy.com
Marijuana.
Marijuana: Sites that promote or discuss the
cultivation, manufacture, distribution or sale of
marijuana for recreational or medicinal
purposes. It includes web pages on legalizing       www.leafly.com,
marijuana, using marijuana for medicinal            thcbiomed.com
purposes, marijuana facts and info pages, and
sites that mention hemp, cannabis, blunts,
panama red, etc.

                                    Super Category: Gambling
Categories and Definitions                          Examples
Gambling: Sites that provide online gambling
                                                    www.casino.com,
or are related to gambling assistance, training
                                                    www.singaporepools.com.sg
information, or advocacy.

                             Super Category: Illegal or Questionable
Categories and Definitions                          Examples
Anonymizer: Sites that allow users to surf the
internet or send email anonymously by               www.anonymizer.com,
providing proxy bypass functionality or             www.your-freedom.net
information or instructions on how to do so.
Computer Hacking: Sites related to the
promotion of illegal tools and mechanisms to
                                                    www.cellphonehacks.com,
crack passwords, generate and distribute
                                                    www.hayy.net
malicious software, or gain unauthorized
access to computer systems.

                                                                       ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   12
                                                     INTERNET & SAAS (ZIA) : ABOUT URL CATEGORIES




                              Super Category: Illegal or Questionable
Categories and Definitions                           Examples
Copyright Infringement: Sites related to
bootlegged or otherwise illegally available          sci-hub.tw,
copyrighted material, such as program, DVD           bingemachine.com
movies, and CD or MP3 music.
Mature Humor: Sites that contain humor and
mature themes unsuitable for teenagers and           thejokeyard.com,
children, but no pornography or strong               badmovies.org
profanity.
Other Illegal or Questionable: Other sites
                                                     salesreceiptstore.com,
related to illegal or questionable activities that
                                                     katcr.co
are not classified in the defined categories.
Profanity: Sites that contain generally
acknowledged profanity but do not fall under a
                                               www.yourfuckingpollingplace.com
more specific category such as
"Pornography."
Questionable: Sites that are generally related
                                                     www.joyofsatan.org,
to illegal activities but do not fall under a more
                                                     www.satanicchurch.com
specific category.

                            Super Category: Militancy/Hate Extremism
Categories and Definitions                           Examples
Militancy/Hate and Extremism: Sites that
promote divisive rhetoric or action, describe        www.newnation.org,
certain populations as dangerous, evil, or           www.klanparenthood.com
promote intolerance of individuals or groups.




                                                                        ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   13

                                      Super Category: Tasteless
  Categories and Definitions                        Examples
   Tasteless: Sites related to torture, human and
   animal degradation, and other behavior
   generally considered too inappropriate for a     www.morticom.com, www.gore2gasm.com
   public audience such as actively aggressive,
   attacking content, and so on.

                                      Super Category: Violence
  Categories and Definitions                        Examples
   Violence: Sites that depict, promote, or feature stranakrovi.com,
   violence.                                        serienkillers.de

                                  Super Category: Weapons/Bombs
  Categories and Definitions                        Examples
   Weapons/Bombs: Sites that promote the use,       dsparmory.co,
   making, or distribution of weapons.              nragungiveaway.org


 Productivity Loss

                                       Super Category: Games
  Categories and Definitions                        Examples
   Online and Other Games: Sites related to
   online games and other websites related to       www.worldofwarcraft.com,
   games that are not included in the defined       agame.com
   categories.
   Social Networking Games: Sites that reside on
   social networking sites and contain material
                                                    www.facebook.com/games
   that merits categorization into the Games
   super category.

                                       Super Category: Health
Categories and Definitions                          Examples
Health: Sites related to an individual’s physical   multiformelegym.com,
and mental well-being.                              ochsstaywell.com

                                      Super Category: Religion
Categories and Definitions                          Examples
Alt/New Age: Sites related to non-traditional
or nonreligious spiritual belief systems, or        thetarotguide.com,
related to the practice or advocacy of              mirsularii.com
affecting events through supernatural means.
Cult: Sites related to groups or movements
whose membership is marked by zeal,                 theflatearthsociety.org,
passion, and obedience to a degree generally        medaglia-miracolosa.it
considered excessive by the mainstream.
Other Religion: Other sites related to religion     stmarkstn.org,
that is not classified in the defined categories.   qcforjesus.com
Traditional Religion: Sites related to
                                                    www.chc.org.sg,
traditionally organized religious activities,
                                                    www.buddhanet.net
participation, and belief.

                              Super Category: Shopping and Auctions
Categories and Definitions                          Examples
Online Auctions: Sites that offer participation
                                                    www.quibids.com,
in online auctions or support the offer and
                                                    www.onlineauction.com
purchase of goods between individuals.
Online Shopping: Sites that provide, or
                                                    www.overstock.com,
advertise ways to purchase products or
                                                    www.amazon.com
services over the internet or by telephone.
Other Shopping and Auctions: Other sites            thecholmeleyarms.co.uk,
related to shopping and auctions that are not       shoppiego.com

                             Super Category: Shopping and Auctions
Categories and Definitions                         Examples
included in the defined categories.
Real Estate: Sites that offer information or
                                                   www.redas.com,
services related to buying, selling, renting, or
                                                   www.propnex.com
financing a property.

                             Super Category: Social and Family Issues
Categories and Definitions                         Examples
Family Issues: Sites related to issues specific
                                                   maritallaws.com,
to the family such as divorce, adoption,
                                                   resetting-the-family.com
infertility, domestic violence, and so on.
Other Social and Family Issues: Other sites
                                                   hopecle.org,
related to social and family issues that are not
                                                   familiesforfamilies.net
classified in the defined categories.
Social Issues: Sites related to issues generally
considered to engender controversies, such         kandoo.me,
as abortion, euthanasia, legalization of drugs,    robindiangelo.com
and so on.

                              Super Category: Society and Lifestyle
Categories and Definitions                         Examples
Alcohol/Tobacco: Sites related to the use of
alcohol and tobacco products, excluding those www.martell.com,
that inform on the hazards of alcohol and     melbournehookah.com.au
tobacco.
Lifestyle: Sites related to lifestyle activities   www.lambda.org,
such as parties and so on for all orientations.    www.clubmask.com
Art/Culture: Sites related to the mores,           www.artandculture.com,
activities, organizations, and collective          www.metmuseum.org

                              Super Category: Society and Lifestyle
Categories and Definitions                         Examples
behavior of peoples that define various
cultures around the world.
Dining/Restaurant: Sites that list, discuss,
                                                   www.mcdonalds.com,
review, advertise, or promote dining and
                                                   www.hungrygowhere.com
restaurants.
Hobbies/Leisure: Sites related to hobbies and
                                                   jenniemasterson.com,
leisure, or pursuits or interests engaged in for
                                                   takemefishing.org
pleasure and relaxation.

                                                   carolineandmichael2020.com,
related to society and lifestyle that are not
                                                   ashlandandblake.com
classified in the defined categories.
Social Networking: Sites that enable the
creation of online communities or the              www.facebook.com,
facilitation of personal introductions, dating,    www.linkedin.com
and networking.

                     Super Category: Special Interests/Social Organizations
Categories and Definitions                         Examples
Special Interests/Social Organizations: Sites
related to charitable organizations, community     www.greenpeace.org,
or environmental interest groups, or social        www.audi-denkwerkstatt.de
advocacy.

                                      Super Category: Sports
Categories and Definitions                         Examples

                                                   espn.go.com,
Sports: Sites related to sports or recreation.
                                                   www.nba.com




                                                                      ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   17
                                                           INTERNET & SAAS (ZIA) : ABOUT URL CATEGORIES




    Privacy Risk

                                            Super Category: Security
     Categories and Definitions                            Examples

      Custom Encrypted Content: Sites that use
      custom encryption for protecting users’ data.        mask.icloud.com,
      Zscaler can inspect the HTTP headers of such         app.stupendo.co
      sites but not the body content.
      Dynamic DNS Host: Sites that dynamically
      update the IP address of the hostname and
                                                           dyndns.com,
      provide DNS resolution. This category
                                                           no-ip.com
      includes DNS server URLs that support
      Dynamic DNS resolution.
      Newly Revived Domains: Sites that were
      reactivated after a brief period of inactivity for
      about 10 days. Some of these websites were
      originally active with a legitimate reputation.
      To enable the use of this category, select
      Enable Suspicious New Domains Lookup in
      your Advanced URL Policy Settings.

      Other Security: Other sites related to security trustwave.ctscloud.com,
      that are not included in the defined categories. microsoftinternetsafety.net
      Spyware/Adware: Sites that are known to
      distribute or contain code that displays             www.spywareremove.com,
      unwanted advertisements or that gathers user         www.virusspy.com
      information without the user’s knowledge.



You can download the preceding list:  Download




                                                                              ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   18
                                                       INTERNET & SAAS (ZIA) : ABOUT URL CATEGORIES




     URL categories provide the following benefits and enable you to:
          Accurately categorize websites based on their content.
          Control access to websites more effectively.
         Properly use URL classification which complements our existing policies (Data Loss
          Prevention (DLP), Sandbox, Filetype, and SSL/TLS Policies).
          Create custom URL categories that provide greater flexibility while creating URL Filtering
          rules.

You cannot add new classes, nor can you edit or delete the predefined classes. Each class has super
categories. You cannot add or delete super categories, but you can move them from one class to
another for easier management. For example, your organization is in the entertainment field and your
users often visit entertainment sites. You can move the Entertainment/Recreation super category to the
Business Use class. You can also add additional custom categories to the super category by clicking
the Add icon that appears next to the super category in Policies > Access Control > Internet & SaaS >
URL Categories.
For the predefined categories, you can add URLs or IP addresses, keywords, and IP ranges for websites
you want to be included in that category. You can also enter subdomains (for example,
mail.google.com). This can be done by clicking the Edit icon that appears next to it in the list of URL
categories found in Policies > Access Control > Internet & SaaS > URL Categories. If you manually add
a URL or subdomain to an existing super category, category, or custom category, you can also specify
whether you want it to retain its original parent category. For example, if you manually add
www.google.com to a User-Defined category, you can specify whether you want google.com also to
retain its original Web Search category. You cannot delete any category that is actively used in a URL
Filtering rule. To delete a category, deselect it in the URL Filtering rule.
You can look up a URL or IP address's categorization by using Site Review  or by looking up URLs in
the Zscaler Admin Console. Since a single IP address is capable of running multiple hosts or
applications, Zscaler does not typically place IP addresses into the predefined URL categories.
However, if a SaaS or cloud provider dedicates an IP address or IP range to an application, the Zscaler
service categorizes it. For example, 13.107.6.152/31 is used for Office 365 and is categorized as
Professional Services and Office 365.
You can also use Web Insights and its filters to learn more about how URL categories are being used in
your network.

Custom Categories
                                                                            ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   19
                                                         INTERNET & SAAS (ZIA) : ABOUT URL CATEGORIES




In addition to the predefined categories, you can create custom categories. Custom categories can be
based on URLs or IP addresses, keywords, and IP ranges. With URLs or IP addresses, you can block
specific websites. With IP ranges, you can block a specific range of IP addresses for websites. With
keywords, you can block websites based on any words that may appear in a URL. For example, imagine
you want to block all websites with the term "gambling" in the URL. If you create a category with the
custom keyword "gambling" and use it in a policy set to Block, websites such as www.gambling.com
and www.gambling101.com are blocked. As custom keywords are applicable to the entire URI, if you
went to www.google.com and searched for "gambling" the search results would also be blocked since
the word gambling appears in the URI (https://www.google.com/search?
q=gambling&oq=gambling&aqs=chrome..69i57j0l4.2767j0j8&sourceid=chrome&ie=UTF-8). You can
also add custom URLs and keywords to a predefined URL category.
You can add up to 25K custom URLs or IP addresses (across all policies that use custom URLs or IP
addresses), and up to 64 custom categories. You can add up to 256 keywords per category, and up to
2,048 across all categories. You can add up to 2,048 custom IP ranges (across all policies that use
custom IP ranges). To learn more, see Ranges & Limitations.
You can also control who creates and manages custom URL categories. You might want to do this if, for
example, you have dedicated personnel managing your custom URL categories, or if you would like to
enable administrators in specific departments or locations to manage their own categories. These
categories can only be managed by super admins, admins with the Custom URL Management role, or
admins with the Custom URL Management and Override Existing URLs role. To learn more, see Adding
Admin Roles.
When enforcing URL Filtering policy rules containing a wildcard, a Public Service Edge for Internet &
SaaS (ZIA) always looks for a specific match first. For example, you have Custom Category 1 containing
the wildcard entries .example.com and .example.com/abc/, and Custom Category 2 containing
abc.example.com and example.com/abc/def. Also, your URL Filtering policy rule states, "For
Location X, block everything in Custom Category 1". In this example, if a user tries to access
abc.example.com or example.com/abc/def from Location X, they won't be blocked because those
exact domain names are in Custom Category 2, which is not blocked.

Changing Categorization
If you think that a website has been incorrectly categorized, there are three ways to request its re-
categorization.
  1. Submit a change request Support ticket.


                                                                             ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   20
                                                         INTERNET & SAAS (ZIA) : ABOUT URL CATEGORIES




  2. Use Site Review to look up a URL, then select the Modify Categories option. This service is
     available for all users going through the Zscaler service. To learn more, see Using Site Review to
     Lookup URLs.
  3. Submit a review of a URL from the End User Notification.

About the URL Categories Page
On the URL Categories page (Policies > Access Control > Internet & SaaS > URL Categories), you can
do the following:
  1. See the maximum limit of custom URLs or TLDs that are allowed and the number of custom URLs
     or TLDs used in your policies. For a complete list of ranges and limits per feature, see Ranges &
     Limitations.
  2. See the number of Predefined and Custom URL categories that are available.

          The count of the Predefined and Custom URL categories dynamically changes based on
      
          the number of URL categories that match the search term.

  3. Configure a Custom URL category.
  4. Expand or collapse all URL categories.
  5. Filter the URL categories based on the following filters:
          URL: Select this filter to view the list of URL categories that contain the matching term in the
          No. of Custom URLs or No. of URLs Retaining Parent Category field.
          Keyword: Select this filter to view the list of URL categories that contain the matching term in
          the No. of Custom Keywords or No. of Keywords Retaining Parent Category field.
          URL Category Name: Select this filter to view the list of URL categories that contain the
          matching term in the Name field.
          All: Select this filter to view the list of URL categories that contain the matching term in any of
          the fields.
          IP Ranges: Select this filter to view the list of URL categories that contain the matching term
          in the No. of Custom IP Ranges or No. of IP Ranges Retaining Parent Category field.
          Pattern: Select this filter to view the list of URL categories that contain the matching term in
          the No. of Patterns or No. of Patterns Retaining Parent Category field.
  6. Search for a term.

       The search term must contain at least 3 characters.



                                                                               ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   21
                                                     INTERNET & SAAS (ZIA) : ABOUT URL CATEGORIES




7. View a list of all configured URL categories. For each URL category, you can view the following
   information:
        Name: The name of the URL category listed under the respective super category.
        No. of Custom URLs: The number of custom URLs or IP addresses in the category.
        No. of URLs Retaining Parent Category: The number of URLs or IP addresses that retain their
        parent category.

     The Custom URLs and URLs Retaining Parent Category fields support IPv6 addresses.

        No. of Custom Keywords: The number of custom keywords in the category.
        No. of Keywords Retaining Parent Category: The number of keywords that retain their parent
        category.
        No. of Custom IP Ranges: The number of custom IP ranges in the category.
        No. of IP Ranges Retaining Parent Category: The number of IP ranges that retain their parent
        category.
        No. of Patterns: The number of patterns in the category.
        No. of Patterns Retaining Parent Category: The number of patterns that retain their parent
        category.

        The number under each column displays up to 20 values when you click it. You can view
    
        the complete list of values in the edit mode of the URL category page.

8. Add a URL category under the super category.
9. Edit a predefined URL category.




                                                                         ©2026 Zscaler, Inc. All rights reserved.   22
